The tenth house is called 'Karma Sthana'. It indicates livelihood.
work, commerce. trade, business. success. rank and poSition. good
conduct. honour. sacrifiCe. command, quality, wealth, wisdom, iodination
and occupation. The 10~ house is the house of lordship, honout dignity
and pubic esteem. It is rightly called as the apex of the horoscope since
l denotes man's worldly attainments. It also denotes one's public life
and popularly, his worldly achievements etc. All questions with regard
to one's wortdty activities and moral responsibilities are determined with
reference to this house.
The 10\ll house indicates one's inclination to rise in business.
profession or occ-upation. It alSo shows how he will fare in his business,
